items.title: Go Ahead is ongewild koning gelijke spelen: 'Moeten onszelf belonen'
items.summary: Bij Go Ahead Eagles baalt men behoorlijk van het gelijkspel van zondagmiddag tegen Telstar. De Deventenaren waren op weg naar een krappe overwinning, maar Jeff Hardeveld gooide roet in het eten door in de extra tijd gelijk te maken. Go Ahead-trainer Melvin Boel kon zijn ploeg maar één ding verwijten.

items.title: Is Pep Guardiola getting ready to leave Man City? Only he knows
items.summary: It wouldn't surprise anybody if Guardiola steps down as Man City manager at the end of the season.

items.title: Slot bemoans luck with referees in loss to Man City
items.summary: Liverpool manager Arne Slot says the club have had poor luck with referees this season, believing that Marc Guehi should have been sent off for a challenge on Mohamed Salah in their loss to Manchester City.

items.title: Engeland in de ban van late VAR-ingreep bij Liverpool-Man City
items.summary: Het duel tussen Liverpool en Manchester City kende een bijzondere slotfase. Liverpool was op jacht naar de gelijkmaker, maar in de counter maakte Rayan Cherki de 1-3. Voorafgaand aan die overtreding had Dominik Szoboszlai een overtreding gemaakt op de doorgebroken Erling Haaland. De VAR greep in, liet een streep zetten door het doelpunt en Szoboszlai werd nog met rood van het veld gestuurd.

items.title: Bosz hoopt Pléa nog minuten te kunnen geven na nieuwe tegenslag
items.summary: Peter Bosz leeft mee met Alassane Pléa, die opnieuw geopereerd moet worden aan zijn knie. De trainer van PSV hoopt dat de Franse spits dit seizoen nog minuten kan maken. 'Omdat hij dat verdient.'

items.title: Haaland scores stoppage-time penalty to seal DRAMATIC win over Liverpool!
items.summary: Highlights from the Premier League match between Liverpool and Manchester City.

items.title: Kian Fitz-Jim terug bij af bij Ajax: 'Vanaf het begin ben ik Plan B of C'
items.summary: Een teken van leven, zo valt de belangrijke goal van Kian Fitz-Jim zondagmiddag tegen AZ het best te beschrijven. Als invaller redde hij in de 93ste minuut een punt voor Ajax: 1-1. Voor de 22-jarige middenvelder is het een welkom hoogtepunt in een moeilijk seizoen. ‘Soms hoop je wel op iets meer steun, eigenlijk.’

items.title: Manchester City keep up title chase with late comeback win at Liverpool
items.summary: Pep Guardiola threw himself back into his seat in the dugout. The Manchester City manager had just witnessed a moment of sheer brilliance and, like everyone connected to his club, he had to fear the worst. Because this is how it has tended to go for him at Anfield. The blow had been administered by Dominic Szoboszlai, the stand-in Liverpool right-back, and it is worth dwelling on it for a moment – if only a moment because it would be rapidly overtaken by a bonkers finale. When Szoboszlai addressed a free-kick 30 yards out, City did not look overly concerned. They only put two men in their wall. Continue reading...

items.title: Bucks' Antetokounmpo invests in Chelsea Women
items.summary: NBA star Giannis Antetokounmpo has announced he has joined the ownership group of Chelsea Women which includes his "friend" Reddit co-founder Alexis Ohanian.

items.title: Haaland earns City dramatic late win at Liverpool
items.summary: Erling Haaland kept Manchester City in the title race with an added-time penalty as Pep Guardiola's side came from behind to win 2-1 in a chaotic finish.

items.title: Liverpool signing Jacquet suffers 'serious' injury
items.summary: Liverpool 's new summer signing Jérémy Jacquet has sustained a "serious" shoulder injury, according to Rennes head coach Habib Beye.

items.title: WSL roundup: Chelsea get back into the groove at Spurs as Madonna watches on
items.summary: Walsh and Thompson seal 2-0 success at Tottenham Liverpool and West Ham win to boost survival hopes Chelsea defeated Tottenham 2-0 to boost their faint hopes of retaining the Women’s Super League title, as Madonna watched from the stands at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium. Goals from Keira Walsh and Alyssa Thompson either side of half-time ended Chelsea’s run of back-to-back defeats and left Sonia Bompastor’s team nine points off the leaders Manchester City, who lost 1-0 against Arsenal at the Emirates Stadium earlier on Sunday. Continue reading...

items.title: VI Live: Real met Mbappé als enige échte ster op bezoek in Valencia
items.summary: Zondag staat ons een fraaie voetbaldag te wachten. De duels van Feyenoord, Ajax en PSV volgen we in aparte liveblogs, maar in deze VI Live blijf je op de hoogte van alle andere duels. Bijvoorbeeld van de Engelse topper tussen Liverpool en Manchester City.

items.title: Premier League live recap: Man City come back to beat Liverpool
items.summary: null

items.title: Haaland wins it late for Man City at Liverpool amid stoppage-time chaos at Anfield
items.summary: Erling Haaland scored a stoppage-time penalty as Manchester City came from behind late on to beat Liverpool 2-1 at Anfield – and keep the title race alive.

items.title: Absolute CHAOS! Szoboszlai sees RED and City goal disallowed after tussle with Haaland!
items.summary: Liverpool midfielder Dominik Szoboszlai sees RED and Manchester City have their goal disallowed after a tussle with Erling Haaland!

items.title: UNBELIEVABLE! Szoboszlai scores sensational free-kick to give Liverpool lead!
items.summary: Dominik Szoboszlai scores sensational free-kick to give Liverpool lead!

items.title: Ireland collapse in T20 World Cup loss to co-hosts Sri Lanka
items.summary: Ireland slipped to a 20-run defeat against T20 World Cup co-hosts Sri Lanka in their Group B opener in Colombo.

items.title: Scottish Cup roundup: Rangers get revenge on Queen’s Park with 8-0 rout
items.summary: Tavernier hits hat-trick as hosts avoid repeat upset Celtic leave it late to deny Dundee shock victory James Tavernier scored a first-half hat-trick as Rangers thrashed Queen’s Park 8-0, avenging in style their Scottish Cup humiliation last season. Queen’s Park famously beat their illustrious neighbours 1-0 at Ibrox in a fifth-round tie last year, but they suffered badly on their return against a Rangers side that has changed dramatically in the past 12 months. The Championship side only got through after Stranraer were expelled for fielding an ineligible player in the previous round. Continue reading...

items.title: Smith's versatility and 'contagious' positivity driving Arsenal
items.summary: Olivia Smith's talent and versatility is helping to kick-start a drifting Arsenal side back into life as they chase silverware on three fronts.
